title: VM Migration API

name.description: Resource name for the location.

list.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service. This method lists locations based on the resource scope provided in the [ListLocationsRequest.name] field: * **Global locations**: If `name` is empty, the method lists the public locations available to all projects. * **Project-specific locations**: If `name` follows the format `projects/{project}`, the method lists locations visible to that specific project. This includes public, private, or other project-specific locations enabled for the project. For gRPC and client library implementations, the resource name is passed as the `name` field. For direct service calls, the resource name is incorporated into the request path based on the specific service implementation and version.

name.description: Required. The Utilization Report name.

requestId.description: Optional. A request ID to identify requests. Specify a unique request ID so that if you must retry your request, the server will know to ignore the request if it has already been completed. The server will guarantee that for at least 60 minutes after the first request. For example, consider a situation where you make an initial request and the request times out. If you make the request again with the same request ID, the server can check if original operation with the same request ID was received, and if so, will ignore the second request. This prevents clients from accidentally creating duplicate commitments. The request ID must be a valid UUID with the exception that zero UUID is not supported (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).

Note that this operation lists the VMs on the remote source, as opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration service.

Note that this operation lists the resources on the remote source, as opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration service.

Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. CloneJob.description: CloneJob describes the process of creating a clone of a MigratingVM to the requested target based on the latest successful uploaded snapshots. While the migration cycles of a MigratingVm take place, it is possible to verify the uploaded VM can be started in the cloud, by creating a clone. The clone can be created without any downtime, and it is created using the latest snapshots which are already in the cloud. The cloneJob is only responsible for its work, not its products, which means once it is finished, it will never touch the instance it created. It will only delete it in case of the CloneJob being cancelled or upon failure to clone.

requestId.description: A request ID to identify requests. Specify a unique request ID so that if you must retry your request, the server will know to ignore the request if it has already been completed. The server will guarantee that for at least 60 minutes after the first request. For example, consider a situation where you make an initial request and the request times out. If you make the request again with the same request ID, the server can check if original operation with the same request ID was received, and if so, will ignore the second request. This prevents clients from accidentally creating duplicate commitments. The request ID must be a valid UUID with the exception that zero UUID is not supported (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).

unreachable.description: Output only. Locations that could not be reached.

utilizationReports.description: Output only. The list of reports.

nextPageToken.description: Output only. A token, which can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page. If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

MigrationError.description: Represents migration resource error information that can be used with google.rpc.Status message. MigrationError is used to present the user with error information in migration operations.

errorMessage.description: Output only. The localized error message.

helpLinks.description: Output only. URL(s) pointing to additional information on handling the current error.

actionItem.description: Output only. Suggested action for solving the error.

Location.description: A resource that represents a Google Cloud location.

locationId.description: The canonical id for this location. For example: `"us-east1"`.

displayName.description: The friendly name for this location, typically a nearby city name. For example, "Tokyo".

labels.description: Cross-service attributes for the location. For example {"cloud.googleapis.com/region": "us-east1"}

additionalProperties.description: Properties of the object. Contains field @type with type URL.

metadata.description: Service-specific metadata. For example the available capacity at the given location.

name.description: Resource name for the location, which may vary between implementations. For example: `"projects/example-project/locations/us-east1"`

networkThroughputAverageKbps.description: Average network throughput (combined transmit-rates and receive-rates), in kilobytes per second.

networkThroughputMaxKbps.description: Max network throughput (combined transmit-rates and receive-rates), in kilobytes per second.

diskIoRateAverageKbps.description: Average disk IO rate, in kilobytes per second.

diskIoRateMaxKbps.description: Max disk IO rate, in kilobytes per second.

VmUtilizationMetrics.description: Utilization metrics values for a single VM.

serviceAccount.description: Optional. The service account to assign to the instance created by the machine image.

singleRegionStorage.description: Optional. Set to true to set the machine image storageLocations to the single region of the import job. When false, the closest multi-region is selected.

targetProject.description: Required. Reference to the TargetProject resource that represents the target project in which the imported machine image will be created.

machineImageParametersOverrides.description: Optional. Parameters overriding decisions based on the source machine image configurations.

additionalLicenses.description: Optional. Additional licenses to assign to the instance created by the machine image. Format: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/global/licenses/LICENSE_NAME Or https://www.googleapis.com/compute/beta/projects/PROJECT_ID/global/licenses/LICENSE_NAME

encryption.description: Immutable. The encryption to apply to the machine image. If the Image Import resource has an encryption, this field must be set to the same encryption key.

machineImageName.description: Required. The name of the machine image to be created.

osAdaptationParameters.description: Optional. Use to set the parameters relevant for the OS adaptation process.

labels.description: Optional. The labels to apply to the instance created by the machine image.

tags.description: Optional. The tags to apply to the instance created by the machine image.

networkInterfaces.description: Optional. The network interfaces to create with the instance created by the machine image. Internal and external IP addresses, and network tiers are ignored for machine image import.

skipOsAdaptation.description: Optional. Use to skip OS adaptation process.

description.description: Optional. An optional description of the machine image.

MachineImageTargetDetails.description: The target details of the machine image resource that will be created by the image import job.

UtilizationReport.description: Utilization report details the utilization (CPU, memory, etc.) of selected source VMs.

enumDescriptions: The time frame was not specified and will default to WEEK.
One week.
One month.
One year.

error.description: Output only. Provides details on the state of the report in case of an error.

displayName.description: The report display name, as assigned by the user.

stateTime.description: Output only. The time the state was last set.

state.description: Output only. Current state of the report.
enumDescriptions: The state is unknown. This value is not in use.
The report is in the making.
Report creation completed successfully.
Report creation failed.

createTime.description: Output only. The time the report was created (this refers to the time of the request, not the time the report creation completed).

vmCount.description: Output only. Total number of VMs included in the report.

name.description: Output only. The report unique name.

frameEndTime.description: Output only. The point in time when the time frame ends. Notice that the time frame is counted backwards. For instance if the "frame_end_time" value is 2021/01/20 and the time frame is WEEK then the report covers the week between 2021/01/20 and 2021/01/14.

vms.description: List of utilization information per VM. When sent as part of the request, the "vm_id" field is used in order to specify which VMs to include in the report. In that case all other fields are ignored.

createTime.description: Output only. The time this target project resource was created (not related to when the Compute Engine project it points to was created).

project.description: Required. The target project ID (number) or project name.

updateTime.description: Output only. The last time the target project resource was updated.

name.description: Output only. The name of the target project.

TargetProject.description: TargetProject message represents a target Compute Engine project for a migration or a clone.

startTime.description: The time the step has started.

endTime.description: The time the step has ended.

previousReplicationCycle.description: A replication cycle prior cutover step.

CutoverStep.description: CutoverStep holds information about the cutover step progress.

AppliedLicense.description: AppliedLicense holds the license data returned by adaptation module report.

enumDescriptions: Unspecified license for the OS.
No license available for the OS.
The license type is Pay As You Go license type.
The license type is Bring Your Own License type.
type.description: The license type that was used in OS adaptation.

osLicense.description: The OS license returned from the adaptation module's report.

SourceStorageResource.description: SourceStorageResource describes a storage resource in the source.

VmwareSourceDetails.description: VmwareSourceDetails message describes a specific source details for the vmware source type.

password.description: Input only. The credentials password. This is write only and can not be read in a GET operation.

vcenterIp.description: The ip address of the vcenter this Source represents.

thumbprint.description: The thumbprint representing the certificate for the vcenter.

oauth_token.description: OAuth 2.0 token for the current user.
